- **Music tempo:** Step-cardio music in TBC is typically ~125–130 BPM. Call it 128 BPM.
- **Beats during active stepping:** ~22 min × 128 BPM ≈ 2,800 beats.
- **Right-foot-onto-step proportion:** In basic step patterns (basic step, V-step, knee-up, etc.), the right foot lands on the platform roughly once every 4 beats (~25%). Complex choreography (repeaters, across-the-top, lead changes) shifts this somewhat, but it averages around 22–25%.
